commands.cmd:
systemctl list-units --type=service --state=failed --no-legend --plain 2>/dev/null \
  | awk '{ unit=$1; if (unit != "") { printf "%s{\"unit\":\"%s\"}", (n++ ? "," : ""), unit } }' \
  > /tmp/.hostlens_failed_$$ || true
printf '{"failed":['
cat /tmp/.hostlens_failed_$$ 2>/dev/null || true
printf ']}'
rm -f /tmp/.hostlens_failed_$$
